errors: The ELM implementation does not explicitly show the required numeric values for the inclusion criteria. Specifically, the age range of 40 to 75 years and the 10‑year cardiovascular risk threshold of 10% (or 7.5%–<10% for selective offering) are not present in the visible statements. Consequently, the numeric values required by the CPG are not confirmed to match exactly.
[HbA1c threshold mismatch – the ELM implementation uses a threshold of 9 g% (and the unit “g%”) whereas the CPG requires a threshold of 6.5 % (percentage).]
["Screening interval in ELM is 3 months (subtract 3 months from today) but CPG requires screening performed within the past 1 year."]
